name: apsal-studio
description: Build live-action AI photography or open a legacy APSAL run, recover its references, package every Prompt, and generate each shot directly with Codex—no image API key required.

interface.shortDescription: 确认十三元素，打包 Prompt，再由 Codex 逐张生成
interface.longDescription: APSAL Studio turns one natural-language idea into five text-card layers covering all thirteen protocol roles, or takes over a legacy APSAL run ZIP by recovering Prompts and references. It automatically exports a documented Prompt/Skill ZIP and hands each independent shot to Codex built-in image generation without calling an image API or requiring an API key.
defaultPrompt: 创建九张真人摄影主题，确认十三元素并打包全部 Prompt。
设计欢喜但克制的主题，用 Codex 内置能力逐张生成。
打开这个旧 APSAL ZIP，恢复参考图并直接用 Codex 生成。
